approveSubmission(uint256).details: Fills one slot. Once all slots filled, task auto-completes.

cancelTask(uint256).details: Can only be called by creator. Cannot cancel if there are pending submissions      (to prevent rug-pulls mid-review). Creator can reject pending subs first, then cancel.      Already-approved (but unclaimed) slots still need to be honoured — those funds stay.

createTask(string,string,string,uint8,ui.details: Fee modes:   deductFeeFromPool=false → creator transfers (totalReward + fee), pool = totalReward   deductFeeFromPool=true  → creator transfers totalReward, pool = totalReward - fee

params.deductFeeFromPool: If true: creator pays rewardPerSlot*slots, fee deducted from pool.                         If false: creator pays rewardPerSlot*slots + fee on top.
params.proofRequirements: What proof the worker must provide.
params.rewardPerSlot: USDC reward per approved submission (6 decimals).
params.title: Short title for the task.

returns.effectiveRewardPerSlot: Reward per slot after any fee deduction.
returns.rewardPool: Actual reward pool (rewardPerSlot * slots after potential fee deduction).

rejectSubmission(uint256).details: Anti-griefing: if creator has rejected >= (totalSlots * REJECTION_MULTIPLIER)      submissions, this call reverts — they can no longer reject. This prevents      creators from indefinitely rejecting valid work to avoid paying out.      Note: Rejected workers can NOT resubmit (one submission per worker per task).      This is intentional to keep state simple. The anti-griefing multiplier ensures      creators cannot abuse rejection to get free labor.

params.proofData: Text content, URL, or IPFS hash depending on task's proofType.
params.taskId: The task to submit proof for.

approveSubmission(uint256).notice: Approve a submission. Only the task creator can call this.

cancelTask(uint256).notice: Cancel an active task and refund unclaimed/unfilled reward pool.

claimReward(uint256).notice: Claim reward for an approved submission. Pull pattern — worker calls this.

quoteTask(uint256,uint256,bool).notice: Compute how much a creator needs to transfer for a given configuration.

rejectSubmission(uint256).notice: Reject a submission. Only the task creator can call this.

withdrawFees(address).notice: Withdraw accumulated platform fees. Only owner.
